reviews.comment:
Muy recomendable. No se puede pedir Más!
Los baños impecables. Cada parcela tiene su asador y su bacha. Tiene un bosque y pasa un río por el medio. La atención excelente. Muy buena ubicación

(Translated by Google)
Highly recommended. You couldn't ask for more!
The bathrooms are spotless. Each campsite has its own grill and sink. There's a wooded area and a river running through it. Excellent service. Great location.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnOWR5WG5nRRAB

Muy buen lugar, el camping impecable, precios accesibles, cerca de todo y excelente atención, para recomendar y volver.

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar. Mantenido, limpio, muy buena atención y precios accesibles para ser un camping con opción a cabañas. La cabañas tienen todas la comodidades.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place. Maintained, clean, with very good service and affordable prices for a campground with cabin options. The cabins have all the amenities.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnMWRYQWtRRRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) It has all the necessary services for a comfortable camping trip, it's close to the city, and it's reasonably priced. It's a shame the complex is small and the noise from the cars somewhat disturbs the peace and quiet.

(Original)
Tem todos os serviços necessários para um camping confortável, fica perto da cidade  e tem um preço razoável. Pena que o complexo é pequeno e o barulho dos carros atrapalha um pouco a tranquilidade.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRbHJLQUFnEAE
